data.body: Completion verifier (correctly) blocked the first close: A4's ACs require the bpmn-js FRONT-END to render/edit the batch criteria + the if: overlay, but the initial commit only did the Python-side IR<->BPMN round-trip. Remediated by building the real front-end: rebarProvider.jsx now (1) distinguishes a batch ServiceTask from an agent one via cfg.batch, (2) renders finder/usd_budget/model_ladder + a 'Batch criteria' ListGroup with add/remove/edit of each criterion (prompt id + optional when overlay), (3) adds an if: overlay-predicate field to scripted/agent/batch steps, and (4) adds a ServiceTask kind toggle (agent<->batch) so a batch is authorable from a freshly-drawn node. A real-browser Playwright E2E (browser_batch.mjs + test_editor_batch_criteria_render_add_remove_edit) drives a v3 fixture and asserts render+add+remove+edit+conversion+persist-to-IR; verified passing in headless Chromium. The agent->batch toggle resolves a code-review MINOR (couldn't create a batch step from scratch). Commits 974dfce2 (Python round-trip) + 26454cd9 (front-end).
